productDisplayName: Baggit Women Quick Mayur Green Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or convert it to a sling bag with the detachable shoulder strap. Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cm Created from genuine leatheretteetteette, with a bow detail on the flap Three fold design that has a concealed magnetic closure One pocket along the side A photo id holder and a pocket on the left fold Four card holder slots on the centre fold A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
